title: Cross-Validate All Paper Claims: Master Fact Sheet from Raw Experiment Data
summary: Demo notebook that cross-validates quantitative paper claims across 6 verification blocks (A-F). Loads pre-computed evaluation results (18 claims from mini dataset), re-verifies each claim using tolerance-based matching logic (absolute, relative, order-of-magnitude), computes per-block and overall consistency statistics, and visualizes results with stacked bar chart and expected-vs-recomputed scatter plot. Uses scipy.stats for statistical helpers (Cohen's d, Hedges' g, Friedman chi2, bootstrap Spearman CI).
